title: Network
prompt: Design the Network page. Discover founders, investors, and collaborators with filters, mutual connections, follow suggestions, and profile previews. Maintain the dark neumorphic + glassmorphism aesthetic.

title: Startups
prompt: Design the Startups showcase page. Display startup cards with metrics (MRR, traction, stage, team size) and tags. Include explore and saved views.

title: Launchpad
prompt: Design the Launchpad page. Show a product launch timeline with milestones, roadmap previews, and feedback threads.

title: Messages
prompt: Design the Messages chat UI. Left sidebar for conversations, right side for threading, typing states, media sharing, and presence indicators.

title: Insights
prompt: Design the Insights / Analytics visual dashboard. Show charts/metrics for engagement, growth, traction, and performance metrics.

title: Resources
prompt: Design the Resources page. Show curated tools, funding links, templates, and learning cards for founders.

title: Notifications
prompt: Design the Notifications page. Organized activity-based alerts grouped by relevance.

title: Profile Dashboard
prompt: Design the founder Profile Dashboard. Show bio, achievements, projects, metrics, highlights, and timeline.

title: Settings
prompt: Design the Settings page. Clean system and account controls UI.
